title: rubus bracteatus
intro: Rubus bracteatus, also known as the Fragrant Raspberry or Bracted Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rubus bracteatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with the leaves and roots being used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
